name: Pets Empire Cat Litter Tray Box Top Entry Top Out to Prevent Litter Spilling for Cat Pet Plastic Toilet Tray (Color : Pink, Size : 47 * 47 * 35cm)
description: Modern cat litter box with top entry - big entry opening, so that even larger cats have plenty of room - lid with perforations High walls of the litter box ensure that litter always stays inside the box,is a perfect way to prevent litter scatter and contain spraying Cat litter tray dimensions: 47*47*35cm. Suitable for cats under 7.5 kg Perforated lid to help remove litter particles from the cat’s paws Rounded shape and included litter scoop makes cleaning easy.
